algorithm_choice.reason: RPT_24 has stable file-first schema with patient, doctor, date, service and paid amount; RPT_48 is less stable for this patient/day enrichment use-case.

join_policy.join_grain: date + patient_initials + doctor_full_name (doctor fixed by filtered source)
join_policy.why_not_service_exact_join: schedule task_body is appointment label, while RPT_24 stores real service lines; exact service equality is not stable enough for primary join
join_policy.cost_column_definition: sum(Сумма оплачено с учетом скидки) across all RPT_24 rows for the same doctor/date/patient pair
